channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: IAF Su-30MKI Fighter Jet Crashes During Training in Assam
item.description: The Indian Air Force (IAF) has reported that a Su-30MKI fighter jet crashed while on a routine training mission in Karbi Anglong, Assam, about 60 kilometres from Jorhat. The aircraft had taken off on ...

item.title: Deputy President Kindiki Urges Unity and Forgives Regional Critics
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki has publicly stated that he holds no grudges against fellow leaders from Mt. Kenya despite the criticism he has faced. Speaking in Meru County during an inspection of ...

item.title: South Korean fugitive using fake Filipino identity arrested in Batangas
item.description: Authorities in the Philippines arrested Kim Yong Cheol, a 62-year-old South Korean fugitive, in Batangas after he had been living in the country under a stolen Filipino identity. Kim was apprehended a...

item.title: Karl Stefanovic to record podcast with Pauline Hanson and Barnaby Joyce after One Nation fundraiser
item.description: Karl Stefanovic, currently hosting the Today show, is expanding into YouTube as an “anti-woke” podcaster. Recently, One Nation promoted a live podcast with Stefanovic, Pauline Hanson, and Barnaby Joyc...

item.title: How AI Tools Help Writers And Editors Improve Their Work
item.description: Nowadays, writers dey under serious pressure to deliver content quickly and correctly. Whether na blog, news article, academic paper, or business write-up, everybody wan make sure say e clear, correct...

item.title: Trump asserts that Iran is seeking a deal to end the ongoing conflict as US and Israeli strikes continue
item.description: President Donald Trump has claimed that Iranian representatives have been contacting the United States to negotiate a deal aimed at ending the current war, which has now entered its sixth day. Speakin...

item.title: Bukayo Saka Admits He Doesn't Know Celine Dion During Chat With Tems on Arsenal Podcast
item.description: Arsenal winger Bukayo Saka, who na Nigerian-born English player, join Grammy-winning Nigerian singer Tems for the first episode of Arsenal new podcast wey dem call 'The Link-Up'. The episode wey dem r...

item.title: Tanzania Begins Key Security Preparations for Hosting AFCON 2027
item.description: Tanzania is seriously getting ready for the big AFCON 2027 tournament that it will co-host together with Kenya and Uganda. In a recent meeting held in Dar es Salaam, the AFCON 2027 National Committee ...

item.title: Former Health Official Faces Fraud Charges Over R1 Million Tender
item.description: Nokuzola Mafunda, aged 69 and former deputy director of HR at the health department, is facing allegations of fraud for allegedly securing over R940,000 through illicit invoices. Initially, her first ...

item.title: Man convicted of second-degree murder in 2023 Winnipeg rooming house shootings
item.description: A Winnipeg jury has convicted Jamie Felix of five counts of second-degree murder following the fatal shootings of five individuals at a rooming house in the West Broadway neighbourhood in November 202...

item.title: Notable Trans Women Influencers to Follow on Instagram in 2026
item.description: Instagram in 2026 continues to shape how beauty, fashion, and self-expression are seen globally. This article lists 30 trans women who have become influential figures through their work in modelling, ...

item.title: Political leaders condemn harassment of journalist Shahzeb Khanzada abroad
item.description: In a regrettable incident abroad, senior journalist Shahzeb Khanzada faced harassment while shopping with his family, which quickly caught attention on social media. Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) Cha...

item.title: Assessing the Regional and Global Implications of the Iran Conflict
item.description: The recent escalation of conflict in Iran, triggered by targeted airstrikes that killed Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and his top advisers, has already had wide-reaching regional repercussions. Iran has...

item.title: Maxim Shkret's Colorful and Expressive Animal Illustrations
item.description: Digital artist Maxim Shkret has created a captivating collection of animal portraits characterized by bold colors, dynamic compositions, and a unique futuristic style. His work spans a wide range of c...

item.title: Transport Group Files Graft Complaint Against LTFRB Chair Over Alleged Fees
item.description: A Philippine transport group, FELTOP, has filed a graft complaint before the Ombudsman against LTFRB Chairperson Vigor Mendoza II and Anthony Quiambao of Stradcom Corporation. The complaint alleges th...

item.title: BFAR Issues Warning on Poisonous Fish and Crabs That Can Be Fatal
item.description: The Bureau of Fisheries and Aquatic Resources (BFAR) reminded the public to avoid eating certain fish and crab species due to the presence of deadly toxins. Specifically, BFAR identified the Pufferfis...

item.title: Prince Albert toddler dies; police and coroner investigating
item.description: Police in Prince Albert, Saskatchewan, are conducting an investigation into the death of a three-year-old boy. On the evening of March 3, officers responded to a residence in the 900 Block of 2nd Stre...

item.title: Municipal Licensing Delays Hinder Spaza Shops from Receiving Government Support
item.description: The Portfolio Committee on Small Business Development has highlighted that delays by municipalities in issuing operating licences are significantly hindering spaza shops from accessing government fund...

item.title: SBP Expected to Maintain Policy Rate at 10.5% Amid Rising Oil Prices and Inflation Risks
item.description: The State Bank of Pakistan (SBP) is widely expected to keep its key policy rate unchanged at 10.5 per cent during the upcoming monetary policy review on Monday, according to a Reuters poll of analysts...

item.title: Rivers State Launches Dr Peter Odili Cancer and Cardiovascular Centre with Free Screening Services
item.description: The Rivers State Government don officially open the Dr Peter Odili Cancer and Cardiovascular Centre for public use inside Port Harcourt. The centre dey offer free screening for cancer plus different c...
